name: claude-worktree-toolkit
description: Graphite-aware worktree management for Claude Code: /worktree, /unworktree, and the hooks that make EnterWorktree actually move the session.

plugins.name: worktree-toolkit
plugins.description: Create git worktrees from PR numbers or branch names with a live picker, reclaim worktree branches back into main, and auto-copy gitignored dev files. Uses the native EnterWorktree/ExitWorktree tools via bundled WorktreeCreate/WorktreeRemove hooks so the session's project directory follows the worktree.
